race.comment: Another wide open affair. KA YING CHEER (6) wasn't quite as dominant as he'd been in two previous wins last time over this route but he was heavily supported and got his head down at the right time to make it 3/3 since coming from Hong Kong. Don't mind a wide draw for him off a strong tempo. RUE DE ROYALE (5) continues to race well, just finding a swooper to strong late at Flemington when last seen. Most of his good recent form has been down the straight but he'll be up on speed and hard to run down. LAA DE SHA (2) won nicely two back, just missing in a series final at Cranbourne last time when in the market. He'll be competitive again. THEBLADE (7) resumes having won two on the bounce prior to a spell. He can kick up to try and hold leader's back here and that will see him hard to beat. MYTEMPTATION (4) beat LAA DE SHA last time and must have claims off that.
